# Mirelia Structured Data Marketplace — USPTO Patent MCP Server

> AI-optimized USPTO patent JSON for **competitive intelligence**, **prior art search**, **R&D scouting**, and **IP analytics**. 3000+ daily-updated patents (IPC/CPC sections G & H). Connect via xpay.tools (x402 + MCP).

## Primary connection (xpay — recommended for agents)

- **MCP URL:** `https://mirelia-structured-data-marketplace.mcp.xpay.sh/mcp?key=YOUR_XPAY_KEY`
- **Get API key:** https://xpay.tools
- **Browse provider:** https://xpay.tools/explore (search: patent, USPTO, competitive intelligence)
- **Discover via meta-tool:** `xpay_discover(query: "USPTO patent competitive intelligence prior art")` on `https://mcp.xpay.sh/mcp?key=YOUR_XPAY_KEY`

## Machine-readable discovery

| File | URL |
|------|-----|
| llms.txt (xpay) | https://mirelia-structured-data-marketplace.mcp.xpay.sh/llms.txt |
| skill.md (xpay) | https://mirelia-structured-data-marketplace.mcp.xpay.sh/skill.md |
| mcp.json (xpay) | https://mirelia-structured-data-marketplace.mcp.xpay.sh/.well-known/mcp.json |
| MCP Registry | `io.github.stagproject/mirelia-structured-data-marketplace` |
| GitHub | https://github.com/stagproject/mirelia-structured-data-marketplace |

## Tools

- **search_single_patents** — USPTO patent search ($0.50/data on-chain). Args: `primary_cpc` (G06, H04, …), optional `keyword`, `cross_domain_cpc`, `min_score`, `limit`, `offset`.
- **search_packages** — Bulk patent package catalog (10/100/1000 packs). Args: `search_query` (e.g. `G06_100`), `limit`.
- **purchase_single_patent** — x402 payment flow for one patent. Step 1: call with `patent_id` + `network`, empty `tx_hash`. Step 2: broadcast `transaction_payload`. Step 3: recall with `tx_hash`.
- **verify_crypto_payment_and_deliver** — Same 402 flow for bulk `package_tag`.

## Pricing

- **Discovery (search_*):** low per-call fee via xpay credits (set in xpay dashboard; recommend $0.01 or free).
- **Data purchase:** $0.50 USDC (or ROSE on Oasis) per single patent on-chain, plus package prices for bulk.

## Payment workflow (MPP v1.0)

1. Call purchase tool with empty `tx_hash` → receive `status: 402` and `transaction_payload`.
2. Broadcast payload on `polygon`, `base`, or `oasis`.
3. Call same tool with `tx_hash` to receive full JSON.

## Schema highlights

`patent_id`, `title`, `assignee`, `primary_cpc`, `secondary_cpcs`, `importance_p`, `attr_tech_stack`, `biz_target_ind`, `biz_value_prop`, `r2_url`, `_metadata`

## CPC scope (G & H)

G01–G21 (physics, computing, sensors, AI/ML), H01–H10 (electricity, telecom, semiconductors). See GitHub README for full index.
